channel.title: Programming on Alan Aw
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on Alan Aw

item.title: Computing Euclidean Distances
item.description: In recent work involving resampling, I had to implement a fast procedure involving computing pairwise distances from a large matrix many times. This led me to the following investigation. Given an array \(\mathbf{X}\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times p}\), where the rows index \(n\) samples and columns index \(p\) features, how fast does it take to compute pairwise Euclidean distances for each pair of samples? To answer this question, we can performing a timing analysis with the help of the microbenchmark package.
